description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages static, build, test, integration, build_report_application, and deploy, using the python:3.9 image (via ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_PYTHON}) and node images defined by variables, and setting GITLAB_CI_PYPI_TOX to tox==3.14.5 and GITLAB_CI_PYPI_TWINE to twine==3.1.1. In the static stage add flake8, isort, pylint, and yapf jobs each running "apt-get update && apt-get install git-lfs", then "pip install \"$GITLAB_CI_PYPI_TOX\"", and finally "tox -e \"flake8\"" (or "isort", "pylint", "yapf" respectively), plus a static_js_css job using node:12.13.1 that runs "npm install -g prettier" and "prettier --check \"./polaris/**/*.html\"". In the build stage add a build job that runs the same before_script, then "rm -rf dist" and "tox -e \"build\"", publishing the dist directory as an always artifact that expires in one week. In the test stage add a test job with the same before_script and "tox -e \"pytest\"" and a coverage regex, and in the integration stage add an integration job with the same before_script and "tox -e \"robot\"", storing robot/output and robot/gl.log as week‑long artifacts. In the build_report_application stage add a tag‑only job using node:latest that cd's into polaris/reports/application, runs "yarn install", "unset CI", "yarn build", and saves the resulting build directory as an artifact, and in the deploy stage add a tag‑only job that requires PYPI_USERNAME and PYPI_PASSWORD, uses python:3.9, installs twine==3.1.1, then runs "rm -rf dist", "python setup.py bdist_wheel", and "twine upload -u \"$PYPI_USERNAME\" -p \"$PYPI_PASSWORD\" dist/*" to publish the package to PyPI.
